instructions.name: add_liquidity
docs: Deposit proportional liquidity into a market.

accounts.name: lp_position
docs: LP position — created on first deposit.

instructions.name: assign_role
docs: Assign a role (Admin, Oracle, Creator) to a wallet.

accounts.name: authority
docs: The admin or superadmin assigning the role. Must be mut (pays rent).

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: Protocol config — used to check if authority is superadmin.

accounts.name: authority_role
docs: The authority's own role PDA (proves they are admin).
Optional: not needed if authority == superadmin.
Validated in handler logic, not in constraints, because it's conditional.

accounts.name: target_user
docs: The wallet receiving the role.

accounts.name: user_role
docs: UserRole PDA to be created.

instructions.name: buy
docs: Buy outcome tokens for a single discrete outcome.

accounts.name: trader
docs: The trader placing the buy.

accounts.name: user_position
docs: Trader's position — created on first trade via init_if_needed.

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA (signs CPI transfers from vault).

accounts.name: vault
docs: Market's collateral vault.

accounts.name: trader_ata
docs: Trader's collateral token account (source of payment).

instructions.name: buy_distribution
docs: Buy across bins proportional to a Normal(mu, sigma) distribution.

instructions.name: buy_to_price
docs: Buy outcome tokens to reach a target probability.

accounts.name: trader
docs: The trader placing the buy.

accounts.name: user_position
docs: Trader's position — created on first trade via init_if_needed.

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA (signs CPI transfers from vault).

accounts.name: vault
docs: Market's collateral vault.

accounts.name: trader_ata
docs: Trader's collateral token account (source of payment).

instructions.name: claim_payout
docs: Claim payout from a resolved market.

accounts.name: trader_ata
docs: Trader's collateral token account (receives payout).

instructions.name: collect_fees
docs: Sweep accumulated protocol fees from a market's vault to the treasury.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Anyone can call — pays the transaction fee.

accounts.name: treasury_ata
docs: Treasury's collateral token account (receives fees).

instructions.name: create_market
docs: Create a new prediction market with initial liquidity.

accounts.name: creator
docs: Market creator. Pays rent and initial liquidity.

accounts.name: creator_role
docs: Creator's role PDA (Creator, Admin, or Superadmin).

accounts.name: oracle_role
docs: Oracle's role PDA — verifies the oracle has the Oracle role.

accounts.name: market
docs: Market account to be created.

accounts.name: collateral_mint
docs: The collateral token mint (e.g. USDC).

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA — owns the vault token account. Does not hold data.

accounts.name: vault
docs: Vault token account — holds collateral for this market.

accounts.name: creator_ata
docs: Creator's associated token account (source of initial liquidity).

accounts.name: creator_lp_position
docs: LP position for the creator (receives initial LP shares).

instructions.name: initialize
docs: One-time protocol initialization. Sets superadmin, treasury, and default fees.

accounts.name: authority
docs: The deployer who becomes superadmin.

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: Protocol config singleton. Created once.

instructions.name: pause_market
docs: Pause an active market (freezes all trading).

accounts.name: authority
docs: Admin or superadmin.

accounts.name: authority_role
docs: Authority's admin role PDA (if not superadmin).

instructions.name: remove_liquidity
docs: Withdraw proportional liquidity from a market.

instructions.name: resolve_market
docs: Oracle submits the resolved outcome.

accounts.name: oracle
docs: The assigned oracle. Must match market.oracle.

instructions.name: revoke_role
docs: Revoke a role from a wallet (closes the UserRole PDA).

accounts.name: authority
docs: The admin or superadmin revoking the role. Receives reclaimed rent.

accounts.name: authority_role
docs: Authority's own role PDA (if admin, not superadmin).

accounts.name: target_user
docs: The wallet whose role is being revoked.

accounts.name: user_role
docs: UserRole PDA to be closed. Rent returned to authority.

instructions.name: sell
docs: Sell outcome tokens for a single discrete outcome.

accounts.name: trader_ata
docs: Trader's collateral token account (receives payment).

instructions.name: sell_all
docs: Sell the trader's entire position in a continuous market.
Reads holdings directly from the position account — no distribution fitting needed.

instructions.name: sell_distribution
docs: Sell across bins proportional to a Normal(mu, sigma) distribution.

instructions.name: sell_to_price
docs: Sell outcome tokens to reach a target probability.

accounts.name: trader_ata
docs: Trader's collateral token account (receives payment).

instructions.name: unpause_market
docs: Unpause a paused market. If deadline has passed, transitions to PendingResolution.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Admin or superadmin.

accounts.name: authority_role
docs: Authority's admin role PDA (if not superadmin).

instructions.name: update_fees
docs: Update protocol fee parameters (superadmin only).

accounts.name: authority
docs: Must be the superadmin.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Signer does not have the required role

errors.name: InvalidRole
errors.msg: Invalid role type

errors.name: RoleAlreadyAssigned
errors.msg: This role is already assigned to the target wallet

errors.name: AdminCannotAssignAdmin
errors.msg: Admin cannot assign the Admin role; only superadmin can

errors.name: MarketNotActive
errors.msg: Market is not in Active state

errors.name: MarketClosed
errors.msg: Market deadline has passed; no more trading

errors.name: MarketNotPendingResolution
errors.msg: Market is not in PendingResolution state

errors.name: MarketAlreadyResolved
errors.msg: Market has already been resolved

errors.name: MarketPaused
errors.msg: Market is paused

errors.name: MarketNotPaused
errors.msg: Market is not paused

errors.name: MarketNotResolved
errors.msg: Market is not in Resolved state

errors.name: InvalidOutcome
errors.msg: Invalid outcome index

errors.name: InvalidRange
errors.msg: range_max must be greater than range_min

errors.name: InvalidDeadline
errors.msg: Deadline must be in the future

errors.name: InvalidNumOutcomes
errors.msg: Number of outcomes is out of allowed bounds

errors.name: InvalidMarketType
errors.msg: Invalid market type

errors.name: BinCountExceeded
errors.msg: Bin count exceeds maximum

errors.name: InvalidKernelWidth
errors.msg: kernel_width must be < num_outcomes for continuous markets, and 0 for binary/multi

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient collateral balance

errors.name: InsufficientLiquidity
errors.msg: Insufficient liquidity in the AMM

errors.name: InsufficientHoldings
errors.msg: Insufficient token holdings to sell

errors.name: TradeTooSmall
errors.msg: Trade amount is below the minimum

errors.name: InvalidSigma
errors.msg: Sigma must be greater than zero

errors.name: WrongMarketType
errors.msg: This instruction is not valid for this market type

errors.name: InvalidProbability
errors.msg: Target probability out of valid range

errors.name: TargetAlreadyMet
errors.msg: Target probability is already met or on the wrong side of current price

errors.name: MaxCollateralExceeded
errors.msg: Required collateral exceeds max_collateral

errors.name: MinCollateralNotMet
errors.msg: Returned collateral is below min_collateral_out

errors.name: AlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: Payout has already been claimed

errors.name: NothingToClaim
errors.msg: No winning tokens held; nothing to claim

errors.name: InvariantViolation
errors.msg: L2-norm invariant violated after operation

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: DivisionByZero
errors.msg: Division by zero

errors.name: SqrtFailed
errors.msg: Square root computation failed

errors.name: FeeTooHigh
errors.msg: Fee exceeds the maximum allowed basis points

errors.name: NoFeesToCollect
errors.msg: No protocol fees to collect

errors.name: InsufficientShares
errors.msg: Cannot remove more LP shares than held

errors.name: LiquidityTooSmall
errors.msg: Liquidity amount is below the minimum

errors.name: ResolvedValueOutOfRange
errors.msg: Resolved value is outside the market range

errors.name: WrongOracle
errors.msg: Signer is not the assigned oracle for this market

fields.name: amount
docs: Amount of collateral to deposit as liquidity (token-native units).

fields.name: role
docs: Role to assign (1=Admin, 2=Oracle, 3=Creator).

fields.name: outcome
docs: Which outcome to buy (0..num_outcomes-1).

fields.name: collateral_amount
docs: Amount of collateral to spend (token-native units, e.g. USDC micro-units).

fields.name: mu
docs: Center of the Normal distribution (same scale as market.range_min/max).

fields.name: sigma
docs: Standard deviation of the Normal distribution (same scale, must be > 0).

fields.name: collateral_amount
docs: Amount of collateral to spend (token-native units).

fields.name: outcome
docs: Which outcome to buy (0..num_outcomes-1).

fields.name: target_probability
docs: Target probability for this outcome, scaled to SCALE (e.g. 700_000_000 = 70%).

fields.name: max_collateral
docs: Maximum gross collateral the trader is willing to pay (slippage protection).

fields.name: market_type
docs: 0 = Binary, 1 = Multi, 2 = Continuous.

fields.name: num_outcomes
docs: Number of outcomes (binary=2, multi=3..32) or bins (continuous=2..256).

fields.name: deadline
docs: Unix timestamp deadline.

fields.name: oracle
docs: Oracle wallet authorized to resolve.

fields.name: initial_liquidity
docs: Collateral to deposit as initial liquidity (token-native units).

fields.name: range_min
docs: Lower bound of continuous range (scaled 10^9). 0 for discrete.

fields.name: range_max
docs: Upper bound of continuous range (scaled 10^9). 0 for discrete.

fields.name: kernel_width
docs: Smooth settlement kernel width for continuous markets — number of bins
on each side of the winning bin that receive partial payouts.
0 = winner-take-all (default). Ignored (forced to 0) for binary/multi.
Must be < num_outcomes for continuous markets.

fields.name: treasury
docs: Wallet that receives protocol fees.

types.name: LpPosition
docs: An LP's share in a specific market's liquidity pool.
Seeds: ["lp_position", market_pubkey, user_pubkey]

fields.name: version
docs: Schema version.

fields.name: market
docs: The market this LP position belongs to.

fields.name: user
docs: The LP's wallet.

fields.name: shares
docs: Number of LP shares held. Proportional to the LP's fraction of the pool.

fields.name: deposited_collateral
docs: Cumulative collateral deposited as liquidity.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

fields.name: _padding
docs: Reserved for future fields.

types.name: Market
docs: A prediction market with its AMM state.
Unified struct for binary, multi-outcome, and continuous (binned) markets.
Seeds: ["market", market_id.to_le_bytes()]

fields.name: version
docs: Schema version for upgrade-safe deserialization.

fields.name: market_id
docs: Unique, auto-incremented market identifier.

fields.name: market_type
docs: 0 = Binary, 1 = Multi-outcome, 2 = Continuous. See MarketType.

fields.name: state
docs: Current lifecycle state. See MarketState.

fields.name: creator
docs: Wallet that created this market.

fields.name: oracle
docs: Oracle wallet authorized to resolve this market.

fields.name: collateral_mint
docs: SPL token mint used as collateral (e.g. USDC).

fields.name: vault
docs: Address of the SPL token vault holding collateral.

fields.name: deadline
docs: Unix timestamp after which trading stops and resolution can begin.

fields.name: created_at
docs: Unix timestamp of market creation.

fields.name: resolved_at
docs: Unix timestamp of resolution (0 until resolved).

fields.name: num_outcomes
docs: Number of outcomes (binary = 2, multi ≤ 32) or bins (continuous ≤ 256).
Determines the length of the `reserves` vector.

fields.name: k_squared
docs: Squared L2-norm invariant: Σ reserves[i]² = k_squared.
Stored as u128 to avoid overflow on sums of u64 squares.

fields.name: total_minted
docs: Total collateral deposited as complete sets (token-native units).
At any time: ∀ i, total_minted = reserves[i] + Σ_users(holdings[i]).

fields.name: lp_shares_total
docs: Total outstanding LP shares across all providers.

fields.name: lp_fee_accumulated
docs: Accumulated LP fee portion (collateral-native units).
Paid out proportionally when LPs remove liquidity.

fields.name: protocol_fee_accumulated
docs: Accumulated protocol fee (collateral-native units).
Swept to treasury via `collect_fees` instruction.

fields.name: range_min
docs: Lower bound of the continuous outcome range (scaled by 10^9).
0 for discrete markets.

fields.name: range_max
docs: Upper bound of the continuous outcome range (scaled by 10^9).
0 for discrete markets.

fields.name: resolved_outcome
docs: Index of the winning outcome (binary/multi) or winning bin (continuous).
Only meaningful when state == Resolved.

fields.name: resolved_value
docs: Exact resolved value for continuous markets (same scale as range_min/max).
0 for discrete markets.

fields.name: bump
docs: Market PDA bump seed.

fields.name: vault_authority_bump
docs: Vault authority PDA bump seed (for CPI signing).

fields.name: kernel_width
docs: Smooth settlement kernel width (bins on each side of winner).
0 = winner-take-all (default, backward-compatible — matches existing
markets whose padding deserializes as zero). Only meaningful for
continuous markets; binary/multi force this to 0 at initialization.

fields.name: scaling_factor
docs: Solvency scaling factor for kernel resolution (SCALE-denominated).
0 until the market is resolved; SCALE (10^9) once resolved when no
dilution is needed; < SCALE when raw kernel claims would exceed
`total_minted` (proportionally dilutes each claimant). Only meaningful
for continuous markets with `kernel_width > 0`.

fields.name: _padding
docs: Reserved for future schema versions. Consumed from the front
when new fields are added; total byte offset of `reserves` stays
constant for a given padding size.

fields.name: reserves
docs: AMM reserves per outcome/bin.
Length = num_outcomes. Serialized as Borsh Vec (4-byte length prefix + data).

fields.name: trader_token_totals
docs: Total trader-held tokens per outcome/bin (sum of all UserPosition holdings).
Maintained by buy/sell instructions. Used at resolution to compute the
true LP residual: `total_minted - trader_token_totals[win]`.
Without this, `reserves[win]` diverges from the LP residual after LP
operations scale positions without changing trader holdings.

types.name: ProtocolConfig
docs: Singleton global configuration for the DekantPM protocol.
Seeds: ["protocol_config"]

fields.name: version
docs: Schema version for future migrations.

fields.name: superadmin
docs: Wallet with full administrative authority (role assignment, fee updates).

fields.name: treasury
docs: Destination wallet for collected protocol fees.

fields.name: market_count
docs: Auto-incrementing counter; next market gets this ID, then it increments.

fields.name: creation_fee_bps
docs: Fee charged when a new market is created (basis points of initial liquidity).

fields.name: trade_fee_bps
docs: Fee charged on every buy/sell trade (basis points of collateral amount).

fields.name: redemption_fee_bps
docs: Fee charged when a trader redeems a winning payout (basis points of gross payout).

fields.name: lp_fee_share_bps
docs: Fraction of the trade fee directed to LPs (basis points of the trade fee itself).
Remainder goes to protocol_fee_accumulated.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

fields.name: _padding
docs: Reserved for future fields.

fields.name: shares_to_burn
docs: Number of LP shares to burn.

fields.name: outcome
docs: Winning outcome index (binary: 0 or 1, multi: 0..N-1).
For continuous markets, this is ignored (computed from `value`).

fields.name: value
docs: Exact resolved value for continuous markets (scaled same as range_min/max).
Set to 0 for binary/multi markets.

fields.name: role
docs: Role to revoke (1=Admin, 2=Oracle, 3=Creator).

fields.name: min_collateral_out
docs: Minimum collateral the trader expects to receive (slippage protection).
Set to 0 to accept any amount.

fields.name: outcome
docs: Which outcome to sell (0..num_outcomes-1).

fields.name: token_amount
docs: Number of outcome tokens to sell back to the AMM.

fields.name: mu
docs: Center of the Normal distribution describing which bins to sell from.

fields.name: sigma
docs: Standard deviation.

fields.name: token_amount
docs: Total tokens to sell (distributed proportionally across bins).

fields.name: outcome
docs: Which outcome to sell (0..num_outcomes-1).

fields.name: target_probability
docs: Target probability for this outcome, scaled to SCALE (e.g. 300_000_000 = 30%).
Use 0 to sell the entire position.

fields.name: min_collateral_out
docs: Minimum net collateral the trader is willing to receive (slippage protection).

fields.name: collateral_amount
docs: Collateral paid (buy) or received (sell), before/after fees.

fields.name: outcome_index
docs: Outcome index for discrete trades; 0 for distribution trades.

fields.name: mu
docs: Distribution center (continuous only; 0 for discrete).

fields.name: sigma
docs: Distribution width (continuous only; 0 for discrete).

fields.name: tokens_transacted
docs: Total outcome tokens transacted across all bins/outcomes.

types.name: UserPosition
docs: A trader's token holdings in a specific market.
Seeds: ["user_position", market_pubkey, user_pubkey]

fields.name: version
docs: Schema version.

fields.name: market
docs: The market this position belongs to.

fields.name: user
docs: The trader's wallet.

fields.name: total_deposited
docs: Cumulative collateral deposited into this market by this trader.

fields.name: total_withdrawn
docs: Cumulative collateral withdrawn from this market by this trader.

fields.name: claimed
docs: Whether the post-resolution payout has been claimed.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

fields.name: _padding
docs: Reserved for future fields.

fields.name: holdings
docs: Token holdings per outcome/bin.
Length = market.num_outcomes.
holdings[i] = number of outcome-i tokens this trader owns.

types.name: UserRole
docs: A role assignment for a single (user, role) pair.
Existence of this PDA means the role is active; closing it revokes the role.
Seeds: ["user_role", user_pubkey, role_type_u8]

fields.name: version
docs: Schema version.

fields.name: user
docs: The wallet this role is assigned to.

fields.name: role
docs: Role type (see Role enum below).

fields.name: assigned_by
docs: Wallet that granted this role.

fields.name: assigned_at
docs: Unix timestamp of assignment.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.
